description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin with vertical and horizontal plank siding, giving it a weathered, natural appearance. The structure features a single slanted shed-style roof made of matching wooden planks, with a slight overhang on all sides. One side of the cabin has a single, vertically-planked door with a simple wooden handle, which is shown partially open, revealing a dark, empty interior. The cabin lacks any visible windows or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The wood appears untreated or lightly finished, with visible grain and some surface roughness. The overall form is compact and boxy, suitable for use as a storage shed, small shelter, or utility outbuilding in an urban or suburban setting.
description: A compact, rustic wooden cabin with a slanted plank roof and a single door, featuring weathered wood siding and no visible windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the solid wooden facade with horizontal plank siding and the slanted roof, with no visible openings.
description_view_1: Angled side view reveals the partially open door on the right side and the overhanging slanted roof.
description_view_2: Direct view of the door, which is open, showing the vertical planks and simple handle, with a glimpse of the dark interior.
description_view_3: Rear angled view highlights the continuous horizontal plank siding and the open door extending outward, with the roof's overhang visible.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof with a single slope and moderate overhang, constructed from wooden planks
attribute_window_arrangement: No windows are visible on any side of the cabin
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door located on the right side of the front facade, hinged on the right and opening outward
